bio.name: Rachel Lucena, D.Sc
bio.institution: UERJ - Rio de Janeiro State University
bio.summary: Researcher with experience in Mechanical Engineering and Mathematics, focused on variational principles and numerical methods. Her research includes numerical simulation, finite element methods, porous media flow and compressible flows.

education.title: M.Sc. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering

contact.department: Department of Mechanical Engineering - Rio de Janeiro State University (MECAN/UERJ)
contact.program: Graduate Program in Mechanical Engineering - Rio de Janeiro State University (PPG-EM/UERJ)
contact.laboratory: Laboratory: Environmental Studies and Reservoir Simulation Group - GESAR
contact.address: Rua Fonseca Teles, 121, Rio de Janeiro, ZIP 20940-903 RJ - Brazil

items.question: How can I get in touch?
items.answer: You can send an e-mail to rachel.lucena@eng.uerj.br.

items.question: What are the main research areas?
items.answer: Numerical methods, CFD, finite elements, porous media flow and biomedical applications.
